candidates.text:
Oh, I’m selling socks with tiny wings,  
They flutter off your toes like tiny springs!  
One minute they’re snug and neat and tight,  
Next minute they’re dancing in the night!  

***  

They wear sunglasses, they sing opera,  
They juggle marbles—look, they can’t stop ya!  
They’ll hop on your bed and sing a tune,  
Then vanish in a puff of fuzzy moon.  

***  

You’ll find them on your ceiling fan,  
Or hiding in your mom’s left shoe pan.  
They’ll tickle your toe when you’re asleep,  
Then steal your pillow while you’re deep in dream.  

***  

They’re not for walking, they’re for flying,  
They’ll zoom across the kitchen, sighing.  
“Why do you wear shoes?” they’ll ask with glee,  
“Let’s all float to the ceiling—free as can be!”  

***  

So buy a pair before they’re gone,  
Before they fly to Mars or the dawn.  
They’ll teach your cat how to juggle too,  
And turn your laundry into a zoo!  

***  

Now go, grab your sock-wing kit,  
And let your toes take flight—what a hit!  
Just don’t blame me if your socks all vanish…  
They’ve got a life of their own, and they’re not asking!

Meet the Super-Squishy Pillow,
The fluffiest pillow to hold!
It floats like a cloud in the air,
The softest thing you can mold.
It bounces and wiggles and giggles,
It’s magical, zany, and grand,
The bestest bed buddy ever,
For kids who love to play in their land.

***

It’s perfect for naps and for dreams,
It’s soft as a marshmallow treat.
You can hug it, you can bounce it,
It’s the squishiest thing you can eat.
It’s not just a pillow, it’s a toy,
It’s a pillow that’s also a ball,
It’s a pillow that’s also a friend,
It’s a pillow that’s also a squall.

***

It’s so squishy it’s almost a hug,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a bear.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a cloud,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a chair.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a pillow,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a cake,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a dream,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a mistake.

***

It’s so squishy it’s almost a toy,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a friend.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a pillow,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a squall.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a hug,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a bear.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a cloud,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a chair.

***

It’s so squishy it’s almost a pillow,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a cake.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a dream,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a mistake.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a toy,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a friend.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a pillow,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a squall.

***

So come on, buy the Super-Squishy Pillow,
It’s the bestest thing you can own.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a hug,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a bear.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a cloud,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a chair.
It’s so squishy it’s almost a pillow,
It’s so squishy it’s almost a cake.

My name is Mr. Wobble-Gum,
The chewiest thing in the room!
It sticks to your toes, your knees, and your hat,
And makes you bounce like a rubber cat!

***

You pop it in your mouth, it’s pink and sweet,
Then suddenly you’re floating—what a treat!
You drift to the ceiling, then down to the floor,
You’re floating in circles, then zooming out the door!

***

It turns your tongue into a trampoline spring,
Your sneeze makes the ceiling start to sing!
You laugh so loud your socks start to dance,
And suddenly your pants are wearing a glance!

***

It’s sticky, it’s wiggly, it’s bouncy and bright,
It turns a quiet room into a party light!
You can’t stop chewing, you can’t stop jumping,
You’re now a human, wobbly, bouncing lamp!

***

So grab a pack, don’t let it go,
Or your chair will start to sing the “Hooray!” low!
You’ll be floating, you’ll be giggling, you’ll be dancing,
With a Wobble-Gum smile that’s never fanning!

***

So come on down, don’t be shy,
Try the Wobble-Gum, it’s a cosmic high!
You’ll be bouncing, you’ll be singing, you’ll be flying,
And your teacher will say, “That’s a very funny lying!”

Oh, have you ever seen a sock that can talk?
It's not just any sock, it's a sock that can walk!
It zips on your foot, then it starts to sing songs,
And dances around while you're sitting on thongs.

***

It tells silly jokes that will make you all laugh,
And then it will do the electric guitar, ya-ha!
It plays peek-a-boo with your toes in the dark,
And gives you a hug when you're feeling so stark.

***

It can also be a pillow, a hat, or a ball,
It stretches so high, it can touch the tall wall!
It's soft as a cloud, but it bounces like rubber,
And it's the coolest thing that your friends can't get under.

***

You don't need to tie laces or tie any knots,
It slips on so fast, it's like magic on pots!
It's perfect for running, for jumping, for sleeping,
And even for eating your broccoli and peeping.

***

So come on, little friends, don't be shy or so slow,
This sock is the one that you really should know!
It's a sock with a smile, a sock with a grin,
And it's waiting to be the best sock that's ever been in!

***

So grab it today, before it runs away,
And make your whole world a little brighter each day!
The Singing Sock is here, and it's yours to keep,
The funniest sock that you'll ever meet!
